# @byted-service/timer

[![bnpm](https://web-bnpm.byted.org/badge/v/@byted-service/timer.svg?style=flat-square)](https://web-bnpm.byted.org/package/@byted-service/timer) [![download](https://2y8ngapf.fn.bytedance.net/d?p=@byted-service/timer)](https://web-bnpm.byted.org/package/@byted-service/timer)

[简体中文](https://code.byted.org/nodejs/byted-service/blob/master/packages/timer/README.md) | [English](https://code.byted.org/nodejs/byted-service/blob/master/packages/timer/README.en.md) | [CHANGELOG](https://code.byted.org/nodejs/byted-service/blob/master/packages/timer/CHANGELOG.md)

用于各类异步操作计时以及超时计算

## 安装

```bash
npm install @byted-service/timer --registry=http://bnpm.byted.org
```

## 快速开始

```ts
import { promisify } from 'util';

import { Timer } from '@byted-service/timer';

const sleep = promisify(setTimeout);

(async () => {
    const timer = new Timer(1000);

    await sleep(10);

    console.log(
        'AsyncOperation took %d ms, and %d ms left.',
        timer.cost(),
        timer.remain()
    );
    console.log(
        'AsyncOperation took %d μs, and %d μs left.',
        timer.cost('μs'),
        timer.remain('μs')
    );
    console.log(
        'AsyncOperation took %d ns, and %d ns left.',
        timer.cost('ns'),
        timer.remain('ns')
    );
})();
```

使用 `timer.call()` 重试异步操作

```ts
import { promisify } from 'util';

import { Timer } from '@byted-service/timer';

const sleep = promisify(setTimeout);

(async () => {
    const timer = new Timer(1000);

    const result = await timer.call(
        async (timeout, i) => {
            console.log(
                'Try asyncOperation with %d ms, %d times',
                timeout,
                i + 1
            );

            await sleep(timeout);

            if (i < 2) {
                throw new Error('Try later');
            }

            return 'async result';
        },
        { fnTimeout: 10, times: 3 }
    );

    console.log('Got result from asyncOperation: "%s"', result);

    try {
        await timer.call(
            async (timeout, i) => {
                console.log(
                    'Try asyncOperation with %d ms, %d times',
                    timeout,
                    i + 1
                );

                await sleep(timeout);

                throw new Error('Try later');
            },
            {
                fnTimeout: 10,
                times: 3,
                finalError: (err) =>
                    new Error(`Finally got error "${err.message}"`),
            }
        );
    } catch (err) {
        console.log('Got error: %s', err);
    }
})();
```

使用 `timer.child()` 获取多个 `timer` 分别进行计时

```ts
import { promisify } from 'util';

import { Timer } from '@byted-service/timer';

const sleep = promisify(setTimeout);

(async () => {
    const timer = new Timer(1000);

    const readTimer = timer.child();
    await sleep(10);
    console.log('Read operation took %d ms', readTimer.cost());

    const writeTimer = timer.child();
    await sleep(10);
    console.log('Write operation took %d ms', writeTimer.cost());

    console.log('All operations took %d ms', timer.cost());
})();
```

使用 `timer.timeline()` 记录每个异步操作耗时

```ts
import { promisify } from 'util';

import { Timer } from '@byted-service/timer';

const sleep = promisify(setTimeout);

(async () => {
    const timer = new Timer(1000);

    const middlewares = new Array(10)
        .fill('')
        .map((_, i) => ({ name: `middleware${i}`, fn: () => sleep(i) }));

    for (const middleware of middlewares) {
        timer.timeline(middleware.name);
        await middleware.fn();
        timer.timeline(middleware.name);
    }

    console.log('All middlewares took %O', timer.timelines());
})();
```

## API

### new Timer([options])

创建 timer

-   options: 为 `number | null` 时，相当于 `options.timeout`
    -   unit: 计时单位，默认 `ms`
    -   timeout: 超时时间，默认 `null` ( 无限大 )
    -   startOnCreate: 是否创建时自动调用 `timer.start()`，默认 `true`

### timer.unit

timer 计时单位

### timer.timeout

timer 超时时间

### timer.start()

开始 timer，可配合 `options.startOnCreate` 用于 `创建 timer 时机 != 开始 timer 时机` 的情况

### timer.stop([unit])

停止 timer，调用后 timer 内部状态将停止变化

-   `timer.cost()`、`timer.remain()` 将返回固定值
-   `timer.call()`、`timer.child()`、`timer.timeline()` 将会报错

### timer.cost([unit])

查询 timer 耗时

-   unit: 计时单位，默认 [timer.unit](#timerunit)

### timer.remain([unit[, timeout]])

查询 timer 剩余时间

-   unit: 计时单位，默认 [timer.unit](#timerunit)
-   timeout: 超时时间，默认 [timer.timeout](#timertimeout)

PS: 如果是无限大将会返回 `Infinity`

### timer.call(fn[, options])

在时间限制内尝试调用函数

-   fn: 调用函数
-   options.times: 尝试调用次数，默认 1
-   options.fnTimeout: 每次调用的最大超时时间，默认 [timer.remain()](#timerremainunit-timeout)
-   options.unit: 计时单位，默认 [timer.unit](#timerunit)
-   options.finalError: 调用失败的最终错误，为函数时将抛出函数返回值，否则直接抛出该值

PS: 如果时间限制无限大，`fn` 的第一参数为 `undefined`

### timer.child([options])

获取子 timer

-   options: 同 [new Timer()](#new-timeroptions)

### timer.hasTimeline(key)

是否有 timeline

-   key: timeline key

### timer.delTimeline(key)

删除 timeline

-   key: timeline key

### timer.timeline(key[, unit])

开始 or 结束 timeline

-   key: timeline key
-   unit 计时单位

PS: 二次调用代表结束

### timer.timelines([unit])

-   unit: 计时单位，默认 [timer.unit](#timerunit)
-   Returns: timeline 数组
    -   key: timeline key
    -   cost: timeline 耗时
    -   unit: 计时单位
    -   stoped: timeline 是否结束
